zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Anderson於1594年9月1日在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 奧拉福 笛卡爾 也尤利 煙雨 聖 馬丁 波梅洛易受洗時，她的父親Sir Henry Anderson41歲，母親Elizabeth Bowyer33歲。她於大約1605年與Viscount Charles Wilmot of Athlone結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她埋葬在英國英格蘭米德萊可維斯特明斯特聖 馬丁 在 馮 菲爾茲。

nameMeanings.name: Anderson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern English: patronymic from the personal name Ander(s), a northern Middle English form of Andrew , + son ‘son’. The frequency of the surname in Scotland is attributable, at least in part, to the fact that Saint Andrew is the patron saint of Scotland, so the personal name has long enjoyed great popularity there. Legend has it that the saint's relics were taken to Scotland in the 4th century by a certain Saint Regulus. In North America, this surname has absorbed many cognate or like-sounding surnames in other languages, notably Scandinavian (see 3 and 4 below), but also Ukrainian Andreychenko etc.
German: patronymic from the personal name   Anders  , hence a cognate of 1 above.
Americanized form (and a less common Swedish variant) of Swedish   Andersson  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Andrew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the usual vernacular English form (recorded from the 13th century onward) of the New Testament Greek personal name Andreas . In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech Ondřej (see Ondrey ) and Albanian Ndreu , and also their patronymics and other derivatives (see examples at Andrews ).
History: The surname Andrew was first brought to North America from England by Robert Andrew (died 1668), who settled in Boxford, MA.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Anderson was christened on 1 September 1594, in St Olave Old Jewry with St Martin Pomeroy, London, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Henry Anderson, was 41 and her mother, Elizabeth Bowyer, was 33. She married Viscount Charles Wilmot of Athlone about 1605. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She was buried in St Martin in the Fields, Westminster, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Anderson(이)가 1594년 9월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 올레이브 드 제리 위스 스트 마틴 폼로이에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry Anderson(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Bowyer(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1605년 Viscount Charles Wilmot of Athlone(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 스트 마틴 인 테 필드즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Anderson foi batizada em 1 de setembro de 1594, em St Olave Old Jewry with St Martin Pomeroy, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Henry Anderson, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Bowyer, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Viscount Charles Wilmot of Athlone aproximadamente 1605. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela foi sepultada em St Martin in the Fields, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Olave Old Jewry with St Martin Pomero: ст олав олд джюри вит ст мартинь помирои, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Anderson была крещена 1 сентября 1594 г. в местности ст олав олд джюри вит ст мартинь помирои, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Henry Anderson было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Bowyer, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Viscount Charles Wilmot of Athlone около 1605 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она была похоронена в местности ст мартинь ин т фиелдс, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Anderson se bautizó el 1 de septiembre de 1594, en St Olave Old Jewry with St Martin Pomeroy, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Henry Anderson, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Bowyer, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Viscount Charles Wilmot of Athlone aproximadamente 1605. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Fue sepultada en St Martin in the Fields, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
